triggerEvent.userFeedback: No pages found displaying instead of expected page content
triggerEvent.taskContext: React dynamic page rendering with URL parameters

failureMetadata.originalTask: Display specific agent page when accessed via URL with pageId parameter
failureMetadata.claudesSolution: AgentDynamicPage component with useEffect for page lookup

rootCauseChain: 1. Component receives initialPageId from URL parameters
2. pages state initializes as empty array []
3. useEffect evaluates conditional logic before API completes
5. Error message 'No pages found' displays prematurely
6. API response arrives later but error already shown
stateManagementIssues: Multiple loading states not properly isolated

testCoverageGaps: Component behavior during API loading windows
Boolean logic evaluation with partial state
URL parameter handling with async operations
tddPatternViolations: Missing integration tests for async flows
No tests for compound conditional logic
recommendedTestPatterns: Mock API responses with controlled timing
Test state transitions at specific intervals
Test conditional rendering with all state combinations
Integration tests for URL -> API -> UI flow

correctionPattern.implementation: separate loading flags per async operation
correctionPattern.testing: mock timing scenarios for comprehensive coverage

effectivenessScoring.adjustmentReason: High learning value for React async patterns

immediatePreventionSteps: Add pagesLoading state specific to pages API
Update conditional logic to check correct loading state
Add tests for async state management
architecturalImprovements: Implement state machine for async operations
Use React Query or SWR for better async state management
Create reusable hooks for API + URL parameter handling
Add error boundaries for async components
testingImprovements: Create testing utilities for async component behavior
Build integration test framework for React Router flows
Establish TDD patterns for conditional rendering

forClaude: Always consider async operation timing in conditional logic
Separate loading states for different async operations
Test timing-dependent behavior with proper mocks
Verify conditional rendering at all state transitions
forTddDevelopers: Write tests for async state management patterns
Mock timing scenarios to expose race conditions
Create integration tests for URL-driven components
forReactDevelopers: Isolate loading states for each async operation
Use React Suspense for better loading boundaries
Implement proper error handling for async components
Consider timing in useEffect dependency arrays
